Join the beta

Home is who you trust.

KasaM matches Metro Manila families with verified household helpers — cleaners, cooks, yayas, caregivers, drivers, and nurses. Every profile is checked by a real person on our team before you ever say hello.

Join the beta Closed beta · Android · Invite-only

The people who care for your home
should feel like home, too.

100% Verified.Walang shortcut.

Every helper on KasaM goes through ID checks, a face-to-face interview, and reference calls with real employers — kilala namin sila bago namin sila i-introduce sa inyo. No bots, no scraped listings. Just people our own team would welcome home.

How we verify

The KasaM App

From first helloto first day.

Browse verified profiles, chat safely inside the app, and book with a simple attestation both sides sign — no payments, no deposits changing hands, everything on the record para malinaw sa lahat.

Join the beta.Tara na.

KasaM is free while we grow carefully, one barangay at a time. Walang bayad, walang deposits — a booking is a promise both sides attest to, hindi pera. Request an invite and we'll walk you in personally.
